LanguageData.Greenway_Religion_AbbeyOfTheRoad.descrip: A protestant-style order built around scripture and the travelling pulpit; it prizes scripture, preaching and humble worship.
LanguageData.Greenway_Religion_AbbeyOfTheRoad.label: Abbey of the Road
LanguageData.Greenway_Religion_CanaaniteChurch.descri: A restorationist movement that mixes frontier theocracy and strict social order, inspired by old doctrinal texts.
LanguageData.Greenway_Religion_CanaaniteChurch.label: Canaanite Church
LanguageData.Greenway_Religion_FollowerOfTheApocalyps: A secular movement born from the Old World's collapse; its followers have sworn to help those in need.
LanguageData.Greenway_Religion_OrderOfOurLadyOfTheWat: A Catholic-style order deeply devoted to Mary and the saints, keeping older sacramental practices alive.
